Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 75 9.5.3 Measuring Instruments i) Electronic transmitters a) Transmitters of all types, ranges 10% or 2 no. of each type and model no. (for the measure- and model, whichever is more ment of Pressure, differential pressure flow, level, etc.) b) Electronic cards / PCB’s for each 10% or 5 nos. of each type, type and model and mode l of whichever is more transmitters ii) Temperature elements a) RTDs* of each type & leng th 10% or 2 nos. whichever is more b) Thermocouples of each type 10% or 2 nos. whichever is like K-type, R-type, metal etc. more and length * c) Cold junction compensation 10% or 2 nos. whichever is boxes of each model more d) Thermostatic units for each 10% or 2 nos. whichever is model of CJC box. more e) Thermowell for application 10% or 2 nos. whichever is like mill outlet temperature more and SH/RH/Economiser true gas temp. in boiler * (With head assembly, terminal block and nipple) iii) Local Indicators like temperature, 5% or 1 no. of each make, pressure, differential pressure, flow model and type whichever is gauges and flow meters etc., more (to be divided to various ranges in proportion to main of all make, model, type population) iv) Process actuated switch devices 5% or 1 no. of each type Including all types of pressure, and model whichever is more differential pressure, flow, temperature, differential temperature, level switch devices Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 76 v) Indicators/Recorders a) Digital Indicators of each model, 10% or 2 nos. min. whichever type & range (including relevant is more digital indicators of electrical system) b) Vertical Indicators of each 5% or 1 no. of each model type & model whichever is more. c) Recorders for each type and 5% or 1 no. whichever is more model d) Consumables for continuous 25 rolls per recorder/ 25 nos. recorders Charts Ink capsules per recorder/ 20 nos. per recorder / Ink Pads /Pens e) Consumables for multi point recorders • Charts 5 nos. per recorder • Ink pads 5 nos. per recorder • Print mechanism/ print head 10% or 5 nos. of each type assembly whichever
